title: galium subvelutinum
intro: Galium subvelutinum, also known as Round-leaved Bedstraw, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Galium subvelutinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Galium subvelutinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
